## Steps to Reproduce
<!-- Steps to reproduce the behavior -->
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
<!-- A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen -->

## Actual Behavior
<!-- A clear and concise description of what actually happened -->

## Screenshots
<!-- If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem -->

## Environment
<!-- Please complete the following information -->

**Deployment:**
- Cloud Provider: [e.g., Azure, GCP, On-premise]
- Deployment Method: [e.g., quick-deploy script, manual]
- SBTM Version: [e.g., v1.0.0]

**Browser (if web issue):**
- Browser: [e.g., Chrome, Firefox, Safari]
- Version: [e.g., 120]
- OS: [e.g., Windows 10, macOS 14]

**Mobile (if app issue):**
- Device: [e.g., iPhone 14, Samsung Galaxy S23]
- OS: [e.g., iOS 17, Android 13]
- App Version: [e.g., 1.0.0]

**Backend/System:**
- Kubernetes Version: [e.g., 1.28]
- Node.js Version: [e.g., 18.x]
- PostgreSQL Version: [e.g., 14.x]
- Redis Version: [e.g., 7.x]
